user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable the asset module via a Yes/No setting, so that I can control whether asset tracking is available in the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Asset Tracking Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable asset module?"; Then my choice is captured for saving

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save the asset module setting, so that my configuration persists across sessions
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the asset module enable option; When I click Save; Then the setting is persisted and applied

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete setup efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the asset module option; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and I am taken to the next configuration screen

user_story: As a System admin, I want to cancel changes on the setup screen, so that I can discard edits I did not intend to keep
acceptance_criteria: Given I have changed the asset module option; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
